releases.name: v1.2.0 - New and Improved

releases.author: StevenGann
releases.description:
## What's New in v1.1.0

### 🎉 Features & Improvements

- **Settings tab now works!** - The settings UI was previously never registered. All 4 settings are now accessible:
  - Editable (toggle simulation interaction)
  - Show edit link (toggle [EDIT] link visibility)
  - CircuitJS URL (for self-hosted instances)
  - Code block tag (customize the trigger tag)

- **Security**: Default CircuitJS URL changed from HTTP to HTTPS

### 🔧 Under the Hood

- Modernized build system (esbuild 0.25, TypeScript 5.7)
- Added ESLint for code quality
- Stricter TypeScript configuration
- Reorganized source code into `src/` directory
- Added GitHub Actions for CI/CD
- Updated minimum Obsidian version to 0.15.0

### 📝 Documentation

- Comprehensive README with usage examples
- CONTRIBUTING.md with release workflow
- MIT License

### ⚠️ Note

Plugin renamed from "Obsidian CircuitJS" to "CircuitJS" per Obsidian developer policies.
releases.name: v1.1.0 - It's Alive!
